name: Historical East–West Axis (Louvre → La Défense)
anchor_points: Cour Carrée du Louvre
Arc de Triomphe du Carrousel
Central allée of Jardin des Tuileries
Obelisk at Place de la Concorde
Rond-Point des Champs-Élysées
Arc de Triomphe
Porte Maillot
Grande Arche de La Défense
experiential_description: You feel continuously drawn forward as each arch, avenue, and square opens into the next, like a single unfolding corridor of sky.
perceptual_hint: Stand centered; keep your gaze fixed straight ahead.

name: Grande Arche – Eiffel Tower – Montparnasse Tower Alignment
anchor_points: Grande Arche rooftop terrace edge
Center of Pont d'Iéna
Base of the Eiffel Tower north pillar
Square in front of Tour Montparnasse entrance
experiential_description: From high up, Paris' tallest silhouettes fall into a single line, compressing distance into a thin vertical stack.
perceptual_hint: From the Grande Arche terrace, scan slowly toward the Eiffel Tower.

name: Saint-Sulpice Solar Meridian Line
anchor_points: Main entrance threshold of Saint-Sulpice
Brass meridian line at the crossing of the transept
Base of the gnomon obelisk at the south end
experiential_description: Inside the dim church, the straight brass line anchors your body to a precise north–south direction, making light feel almost mechanical.
perceptual_hint: Walk along the brass line, imagining true north behind you.

name: Paris Meridian (Arago Medallions Walk)
anchor_points: Arago medallion near Parc Montsouris lake
Main gate of Paris Observatory courtyard
Arago medallion in Luxembourg Gardens near central lawn
Arago medallion near Saint-Sulpice square
Arago medallion in Montmartre near Moulin de la Galette garden
experiential_description: Following scattered bronze disks, you sense an invisible vertical plane slicing through buildings, parks, and streets in a quiet north–south rhythm.
perceptual_hint: Seek the medallions and imagine a straight line beneath the city.

name: Left-Bank North–South Axis (Boulevard Saint-Michel → Observatory)
anchor_points: Middle of Pont Saint-Michel on the Left-Bank side
Square in front of the Sorbonne on Boulevard Saint-Michel
Intersection of Boulevard Saint-Michel and Boulevard de Port-Royal
Gate of Paris Observatory on Avenue de l'Observatoire
experiential_description: Walking uphill in a straight line, façades pull you forward while the city slowly drops away behind, sharpening your sense of slope and depth.
perceptual_hint: Notice how the ground rises steadily as traffic flows directly toward you.

name: Montmartre Ridge Sightline
anchor_points: Place des Abbesses center
Corner of Rue des Trois Frères and Rue Yvonne-le-Tac
Small square at Rue Ravignan and Rue des Abbesses stair top
Place du Tertre center
Middle of the parvis of Sacré-Cœur at the balustrade
experiential_description: Each corner reveals a sudden plunge of roofs and distant monuments, as if the city were tilting away from the hill beneath your feet.
perceptual_hint: Pause at openings; let your gaze fall along the slope.

name: Montmartre to Central Monuments Visual Corridor
anchor_points: Central axis of Sacré-Cœur terrace balustrade
Roofline edge above Forum des Halles
Mass of Notre-Dame on Île de la Cité
Silhouette of the Eiffel Tower above Champ-de-Mars
experiential_description: From the terrace the city flattens into layers; monuments appear as aligned anchors within a continuous carpet of stone.
perceptual_hint: From Sacré-Cœur, sweep your view slowly left to right.

name: Seine Inner Bend Structural Curve
anchor_points: Sidewalk on Pont d'Austerlitz midspan
Eastern tip of Île Saint-Louis quay
Eastern tip of Île de la Cité quay below Notre-Dame
Middle of Pont Neuf upstream sidewalk
Sidewalk on Pont Alexandre III midspan
Sidewalk on Pont d'Iéna facing upstream
experiential_description: The river's slow curve keeps shifting your horizon; bridges and façades realign as if the city were rotating around you.
perceptual_hint: Walk downstream on one bank and track how bridges pivot in view.

name: Île de la Cité Western Tip Axis (Vert-Galant → Louvre)
anchor_points: Stone platform at the tip of Square du Vert-Galant
Center of Pont des Arts
Cour Carrée du Louvre central courtyard
Start of the central allée of the Tuileries Garden
experiential_description: From the narrow island tip, the city funnels into a central perspective, with water framing a thin urban corridor ahead.
perceptual_hint: Stand at the very prow; align yourself with the Louvre.

name: Rue Saint-Jacques Historic North–South Orientation
anchor_points: South end of Petit Pont on the Left-Bank side
Intersection of Rue Saint-Jacques and Rue Galande
Square in front of Église Saint-Séverin
Intersection of Rue Saint-Jacques and Rue des Écoles
Place de l'Estrapade center
Entrance square of Val-de-Grâce
experiential_description: The straight, narrow street feels older than its façades, cutting through the Left Bank on a stubborn, almost archaic line.
perceptual_hint: Walk without turning; imagine the street ignoring later grids.

name: Haussmannian Star around Arc de Triomphe
anchor_points: Exact center beneath the Arc de Triomphe
Start of Avenue des Champs-Élysées at the arch
Start of Avenue de la Grande Armée at the arch
Start of Avenue Kléber at the arch
Start of Avenue Victor-Hugo at the arch
Start of Avenue Foch at the arch
Start of Avenue Carnot at the arch
Start of Avenue Mac-Mahon at the arch
Start of Avenue Wagram at the arch
Start of Avenue Hoche at the arch
Start of Avenue Marceau at the arch
Start of Avenue d'Iéna at the arch
experiential_description: At the center, streets radiate like spokes; turning slowly, each avenue becomes a powerful arrow into the city.
perceptual_hint: Stand by the arch; rotate and feel each avenue pull outward.

name: Haussmann Left-Bank North–South Spine
anchor_points: Middle of Pont Saint-Michel on Left-Bank side
Boulevard Saint-Michel at Place Saint-Michel
Boulevard Saint-Michel at the Luxembourg Gardens gate
Avenue de l'Observatoire central lawn edge
Gate of Paris Observatory
experiential_description: Traffic, trees, and façades all align in one broad chute, giving a strong sense of a single structural backbone on the Left Bank.
perceptual_hint: Walk along the median; keep reading the vanishing point ahead.

name: Observatory–Montsouris Meridian Segment
anchor_points: Main door of Paris Observatory central pavilion
Southern gate of Avenue de l'Observatoire
Obelisk in Parc Montsouris near the lake
Arago medallion close to that obelisk
experiential_description: Moving along this calm, leafy axis, you follow an abstract north–south line materialized by gardens, statues, and scientific buildings.
perceptual_hint: Walk in a straight line; imagine the Earth turning under this axis.

name: Montsouris–Montmartre Meridian Extension
anchor_points: Obelisk in Parc Montsouris near the lake
Main gate of Paris Observatory
Arago medallion near Luxembourg Gardens
Arago medallion near Saint-Sulpice square
Garden obelisk near Moulin de la Galette in Montmartre
experiential_description: Crossing districts, you sense a quiet, vertical discipline tying distant hills and parks into one underlying north–south gesture.
perceptual_hint: Mentally project a single straight line through each crossing street.

name: Hill Chain: Belleville – Buttes-Chaumont – Montmartre
anchor_points: Main terrace of Parc de Belleville viewpoint
High belvedere near the temple in Parc des Buttes-Chaumont
Central terrace in front of Sacré-Cœur
experiential_description: Shifting between hilltops, you feel Paris as a basin, with each summit offering angled, echoing views of the others across the low center.
perceptual_hint: On each hill, search the skyline for the next high point.

name: Île de la Cité Longitudinal Spine
anchor_points: End of the platform at Square de l'Île-de-France (eastern tip)
Center of the parvis Notre-Dame
Center of Place Dauphine
Middle of Pont Neuf at the western end of the island
experiential_description: The island narrows as you walk; water appears and disappears at the edges, giving the sense of walking a raised, ship-like ridge.
perceptual_hint: Stay centered; occasionally glance sideways to feel the drop to the river.
